arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta expects 'different energy' of Champions League to lift struggling Gunners
arts.sum: The Gunners need a boost after seeing their Premier League title hopes fade

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta tells Arsenal to get him a winger – €35-45m transfer there to be done
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the picture to sign Bayern Munich’s Kingsley Coman in the summer window. That’s according to Bild, and they state the Bavarian club want to get rid of the Arsenal target. Bayern have to generate money by cashing in on some players and have identified the 28-year-old as a candidate. They are keen The post Mikel Arteta tells Arsenal to get him a winger – €35-45m transfer there to be done appeared first on Sport Witness.

As for the Champions League, Petr Bosz guided his team into the last-16 by finishing 14th in the table with four wins and two draws from their eight matches, and overcame a 2-1 play-off round first-leg loss at Juventus by winning 3-1 after extra-time in the return fixture. They have found things tougher this time around following a recent slump, but in Europe Peter Bosz’s team have strung four consecutive wins together to reach this stage, sparking dreams of a first Champions League quarter-final since 2007.

arts.ttl: Ex-Spurs star Ivan Perisic makes 'angry' admission before firing Arsenal dig
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Dutch side PSV Eindhoven in the last-16 of the Champions League on Tuesday night and will come up against a familiar face in the form of Ivan Perisic

arts.ttl: Arsenal unlikely to appoint 'very capable' sporting director who because the timing is not right - Journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal are starting to step up their search for Edu Gaspar’s replacement as sporting director at the Emirates Stadium and the process is heating up....

arts.ttl: Report: Saudi clubs are pushing to make Arsenal star their marquee signing this year
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs have lost their players to the football revolution in Saudi Arabia and Arsenal could become the latest club to lose one of their players. Saudi Pro League clubs have managed to sign some of the biggest names in world football including Cristiano Ronaldo, Karim Benzmea, Sadio Mane, N’Golo Kante […] The post Report: Saudi clubs are pushing to make Arsenal star their marquee signing this year appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urged to axe Arsenal hero who has already saved Gunners this season
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Dutch side PSV in the last 16 of the Champions League on Tuesday evening and Paul Merson has made a request over the team that Mikel Arteta selects

arts.ttl: Champions League supercomputer picks winner as Arsenal given better chance than Real Madrid
arts.sum: The Champions League knockout stage properly begins on Tuesday with the likes of Real Madrid, Liverpool and Barcelona all fancying their chances of winning the tournament

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Josh Kroenke’s Arsenal training ground visit amid sporting director decision
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta said he was happy to have Arsenal co-chaiman Josh Kroenke visit the training ground ahead of the midweek fixture. Josh Kroenke was spotted at the Arsenal training ground too and Arteta was asked about his arrival.

arts.ttl: PSV vs Arsenal simulated to predict Champions League round of 16 clash
arts.sum: After failing to win three of their last four games in all competitions, Arsenal will be hoping to return to winning ways when they face PSV in the Champions League round of 16 first leg later tonight. We predict that Arsenal could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Rice, Odegaard, Merino; Nwaneri, Trossard, Sterling.
